ACC.summary: The ACC is a Power Four league that carries 10.58% of national title equity across 1000 simulations. Members fill 11.99% of all playoff field slots — a meaningful slice of the 12-team bracket. Miami Hurricanes is a heavy favorite at 35.6% conference title odds. The next tier includes Louisville Cardinals (16.0%), SMU Mustangs (13.8%), Clemson Tigers (6.1%). Miami Hurricanes averages 9.59 wins and reaches the playoff field in 52.3% of simulations. Miami Hurricanes is the league's top national title threat at 5.32% championship odds, and the top three teams hold 78.1% of the conference's title equity. 3 programs carry at least 1% national title equity, led by Miami Hurricanes (5.3%), Louisville Cardinals (1.6%), SMU Mustangs (1.3%). Conference play is demanding: average opponent rating in league games is +1.8 in the model. Stanford Cardinal brings up the rear at 3.93 average wins.
